title: NovaHook
description: Library/API for Entity Texture Overrides at runtime
body:
NovaHook API
---
NovaHook is an API which implements easy-to-use functions for overriding Entity textures at runtime, based on both the default texture which will be overridden, *and* the state of entities in-world. 

Note that this mod **does not** implement resource pack features for end users! This mod is intended entirely as a library for mods which *do* implement resource pack features.

---
Currently available for Fabric 1.17.1 (requires Fabric API version `0.45.0+1.17`, and Fabric Loader version `0.12.12` )

---
**Asset Credits (mod logo):**

Font is a variant of JetBrains Mono: https://www.jetbrains.com/lp/mono/#license

Mod Logo Contains assets from *Flaticon* (https://www.flaticon.com/):

Hook Asset made by: 
https://www.flaticon.com/authors/bqlqn 

Supernova Asset made by: 
https://www.flaticon.com/authors/freepik 

---
NovaHook also contains recolored versions of some vanilla mob textures, used for testing, and will likely change/be removed from release to release. Said vanilla textures are owned by Mojang/Microsoft.
